examples: I made a terrified noise that brought Viny, my old nurse, to the rescue.
Axial lead coil, single or multi-layer winding on ferrite core, coating by epoxy resin. Products can be taped or packed in viny bangs.
Radial lead coil, single or multi-layer winding on ferrite core, coating by epoxy resin. Products can be taped or packed in viny bangs.
